subject: english
title: Unit 8 Writing App — Fun with Paper + YOUR Hobby
subtitle: Landing screen → 📘 Student Book (vocab · model · plan · write · quiz) · 📒 Workbook (6 steps · word map · define+examples · compare intros · second draft). 10 modules total. Cross-deck planner — Leo's chart row and SB draft sync with the teacher deck via shared localStorage keys.

content: Explain a hobby in 4 parts: NAME · DEFINE · HOW · EXAMPLES.
Fill a 4-column planner chart for your own hobby, then turn it into a paragraph.
Recognize the 6 planning steps the writer used in Fun with Paper.
Build a word map for your hobby and pick which words to define + give examples for.
Write a second draft on a Workbook topic (toy, video game, or sport).
language: Use example markers for example and such as in your writing.
Distinguish its (possessive) from it's (= it is).
Use the academic words definition, description, details when talking about writing.
Read the 5 content words in context: origami, folding, design, dragon, crane.
